# Digital Twilight

> Digital Twilight is the independent creative practice of Annalisa Cosentino, based in Zürich, Switzerland. The studio works across brand identity, visual communication, creative direction, film production and AI-assisted storytelling for brands, science and culture.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.digital-twilight.com/
- Email: info@digital-twilight.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/_digitaltwilight_

## Selected work

- [HSWISS Nexus](https://www.digital-twilight.com/work/hswiss-nexus): Brand identity for a Swiss integrative health platform bridging Eastern botanical science and Western clinical research.
- [European Society of Neuroradiology](https://www.digital-twilight.com/work/esnr): Rebrand and visual communication for Europe's leading neuroradiology society.
- [Yoga on Art](https://www.digital-twilight.com/work/yoga-on-art): Brand strategy, visual identity and film for a concept that brings original fine art to yoga practice.
- [Evolve Zürich](https://www.digital-twilight.com/work/evolve): Film direction, photography and brand content for a premium hair atelier.
- [Wer ist Migrant?](https://www.digital-twilight.com/work/wer-ist-migrant): Hybrid short film and animation exploring migration through interviews, visual storytelling and AI-generated scenes.
- [AI Storytelling](https://www.digital-twilight.com/work/ai-storytelling): Selected generative visual and motion projects under human creative direction.

## About the founder

Annalisa Cosentino is the founder and creative director of Digital Twilight. She works directly with clients from strategy and concept through execution.
